tasks.subject: Inspect provider configuration sources
tasks.description: Find where global provider configuration is defined for pi/LaneShadow environment, confirm why openrouter is still present and why lmstudio is missing, and identify the correct files to edit.

tasks.subject: Remove global OpenRouter provider and populate LMStudio models
tasks.description: Update the global pi provider/model configuration so OpenRouter no longer appears in the available global providers and LMStudio is discoverable with at least the currently served local models. Verify with pi --list-models output.

tasks.subject: Trace models command source
tasks.description: Determine which command the user means by "models", identify where its output is sourced from, and verify why LM Studio models do not appear there despite showing in pi --list-models.
